response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure experience with relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and cloud technologies. While his direct GenAI production experience is limited, his technical leadership, open-source contributions, and familiarity with MCP and agentic workflows suggest potential. An interview would clarify his fit for the Staff-level role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with TypeScript and cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes).
Proven technical leadership and mentorship, including workshops and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts).
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) and developer tooling at re:cinq.
concerns: Lacks explicit 8+ years of production-grade AI/GenAI development (focus has been broader full-stack).
No direct mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization in resume highlights.
Limited evidence of leading technical discovery sessions or stakeholder management for AI solutions.
